content: Do you have your friend in another platform?
If yes, tell him to stop
If not, make an alt account and tell him to stop
Why did you even tell someone to off themselves?
That's not really good you know
I may be stupid but I'm not dumb
Things are getting crazy in Femboy Fraternity it seems
I think its a server, since that seems like a "DM private message" type of bot
Like whenever you try to join a server and they ask you to verify your game account?
hmm na, lemme try to find something that mirrors what I mean
well, the oldest I got is this, but I'm almost sure thats a private dm from a bot, even though the button doesn't seem the same
Some dude was using attempted suicide as a get out of jail free card
So I told them they should've finished properly
Wasn't even that far of a comment
You should call support to undo your mute
Or is there not something like that?
I don't think they'll care abt the details 😭
I think its still kinda fighting oil with fire tho
guy is being a self victim prick
but enforcing that he should go through it
its a biiit toxic in itself
Blegh I mean I have this other one where I had no reason to say this
Yeah I guess I'll state out loud the simple
if you can avoid saying it just do
Yeah I mean my coworker forgot the previous week's assignment so he spend 5 days not working
Do I want to tell him to fuck off?
Jump him in the lot afterwards
the system took care of it
system as in people in charge
I'm gonna go bake myself a cake for tomorrow, have great days every1!
Well I can't eat it all alone
I hope you guys have a wonderful today, tomorrow and ouh.. Tofuture?
I'm about to hit the jackpot or lose the run
I just got 3 upgraded cards and only one combat encounter
That means I will have more than 20 health for once
Only way this run ends if if I encounter a 4 enemy elite
Wats the game? Im a little interested
Oh okay thank you thank you!

my friend and i were talking about how much we missed my turn and wanted to play it
and then stumbled onto this game
I'm so gladddd <:pray:1356053116260454534>
Dang, my turn of all things? Bless, traphase will have you covered
is Vortice, GMurphy, Horla and Miryam a good team
all E0 except Gmurphy who is E3
swapping someone like Miryam for base Murphy would be nice but it’ll probably be fine
If i replace Horla with a E12 Goliath would that be good? i needa build Horla
is it for DTide or story?
in story Horla is probably better
